newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The FreeWaterLoop data-center liquid-cooling launch was March 4, 2026 at Data Center World London (already known), and Q1 2026 results were in April. The +3.0% move is flow-driven.

sources.label: Simply Wall St — Alfa Laval data-center moves

verdicts.rankRationale: On the thermal/cooling latent-node lens, nothing new since June 9 — FreeWaterLoop launched in March and data-center order intake (SEK 2.0B→2.5B) was the April Q1 update. Already a large, well-watched industrial; thesis unchanged. Hold flat.
verdicts.bull: Heat-exchanger/fluid leader directly levered to data-center liquid cooling; DC order intake +25%.
verdicts.neutral: Real DC exposure but a large diversified industrial; cooling is a small slice; already discovered.
verdicts.bear: Cyclical industrial with currency headwinds; DC orders still small vs total; +17% YTD prices the optimism.
